description: Bounded platform compatibility exceptions that intentionally remain outside abstract tone roles.

hostStatusModes.label: Host Status Modes
hostStatusModes.suggestion: keep as bounded host-mode compatibility until a true cross-product status-shell language is needed
hostStatusModes.rationale: These status bar backgrounds describe VS Code host modes, not reusable cross-product color-language states.

rendererPolish.label: Renderer Polish
rendererPolish.rationale: Scrollbars and widget shadows are renderer-specific polish details and should remain bounded compatibility exceptions.
